nasb.text: So you will eat fat until you are glutted, and drink blood until you are drunk, from My sacrifice which I have sacrificed for you.

esv.text: And you shall eat fat till you are filled, and drink blood till you are drunk, at the sacrificial feast that I am preparing for you.

cnv.text: 你們吃我為你們所預備的祭，必吃飽脂油，喝醉了血。

ccb.text: 它们要在我为它们设的祭宴中任意吃肉饮血，直到吃饱喝醉为止。
